objective: Implement P4 release readiness packet validation, dirty state record validation, and release lock input bundle construction without creating release locks, build locks, or packages.
implemented_capabilities: Release readiness packets validate required evidence refs, suite report hashes, missing gates, dirty-state policy, preview consistency, human authorization requirement, and self-excluding readiness_packet_hash.
Dirty state records classify CLEAN, DOCUMENTED_DIRTY, and BLOCKED_DIRTY states while blocking release inputs and unclassified dirty records from passing readiness.

Release lock input bundles validate P4 spec/build lock refs, required P4-SPEC-01/02/03 review decisions, suite/package/example/migration/readiness hashes, source git commit, human authorization requirement, and self-excluding bundle_hash.

Release lock input bundle construction reports PENDING_HUMAN_AUTHORIZATION and explicitly refuses release lock creation, package publication, readiness packet embedding, and real lock output path declarations.
Semantic boundary tests reject product requirements, page elements, layout rules, business contracts, and deduced product requirements in release readiness and lock input payloads.

traceability.implementation_target: release readiness and lock input semantic boundary checks

owned_by_p4_impl_05: release lock input bundle construction without lock writes

approval_notes: Approved by explicit user pass after P4-IMPL-05 candidate review.
This approval covers release readiness packet validation, dirty state record validation, and release lock input bundle construction candidate evidence only.
This approval does not authorize P4_BUILD_LOCK creation, DRD_HARNESS_RELEASE_LOCK creation, package publishing, root P4 phase file updates, or any real lock write.
